items.title: Prime Day drops up to 35% off Polo Ralph Lauren apparel and accessories from just $12
items.summary: Amazon Prime Day is bringing some solid deals on Polo Ralph Lauren right now, with savings of up to 35% off a wide range of wardrobe essentials. From logo socks and undershirts to classic T-shirts, polos, and other everyday staples, it’s a great opportunity to stock up on pieces you’ll wear year-round.

items.title: Apple just unleashed massive price increases on MacBooks, score them at up to $800 less during Prime Day
items.summary: Apple just announced some price increases on MacBooks and iPad. The AirPods Pro 3 are safe and still on sale at Amazon, but MacBook Neo just jumped $100, the M5 MacBook Air is now $200 more expensive, and MacBook Pro is wild $300 more than it was this morning, and the M5 Max MacBook Pro is an insane $500 more. These price increase have not landed on Amazon yet and that means you score these machines with what are effectively gigantic discounts – some of them are as much as $800 under the new list prices – get in there while you can:

items.title: Xbox follows Apple with price increases
items.summary: The price increase comes amid rising components costs.

items.title: Prime Day drops up to 50% off Lacoste apparel, sneakers, hats, more
items.summary: Amazon Prime Day is bringing some great deals on Lacoste right now, with up to 50% off a wide selection of apparel, footwear, and accessories. From classic polos and button-downs to sneakers, hats, robes, and boxers, there’s no shortage of ways to refresh your wardrobe.

items.title: UN pauses Strait of Hormuz evacuation plan after cargo ship attacked
items.summary: The ship was reportedly struck by an "unknown projectile" near Oman but no casualties were reported.

items.title: Notion Mail shuts down amid agent takeover
items.summary: The company said it is discontinuing its email inbox in favor of its AI agent offering as users are increasingly handing over the reins of their email to the agents.

items.title: Microsoft quietly extends the Extended Security Updates program for Windows 10 consumers by a year, letting eligible users get updates through October 12, 2027 (Zac Bowden/Windows Central)
items.summary:
Zac Bowden / Windows Central:
Microsoft quietly extends the Extended Security Updates program for Windows 10 consumers by a year, letting eligible users get updates through October 12, 2027  —  Windows 10's ESU program has been quietly extended by an extra year, now ending on October 12, 2027 instead of October 2026.

items.title: Women alleging rape and sexual assault in France call to abolish statute of limitations
items.summary: More than 50 women are calling for the abolition of the statute of limitations which they say has prevented them seeking justice.

The early Amazon all-time lows on the more affordable Ring Wired Doorbell Pro, Ring Wired Doorbell, and Ring Battery Doorbell are still live starting from $40, but today we are highlighting the premium high-end model.

items.title: It’s a bad time to want a new computer
items.summary: It's not exactly surprising that RAMaggeddon is making new tech hardware really expensive. But if you've been in the market for things like a new computer or tablet, this week has been filled with sticker shock. Given how many companies announced price hikes related to component shortages, it seems unlikely things will get cheaper any […]

items.summary:
Ram Iyer / TechCrunch:
Netris, which helps neoclouds automate network configuration to bring their data centers online faster, raised a $15M Series A from a16z  —  The AI boom has encouraged everyone and their uncle to launch a data center business.  But spinning up a data center isn't easy.

items.title: France warns even young people's health at risk as Europe's heatwave shifts east
items.summary: Temperatures in Germany could hit 40C in some areas while French officials say deaths linked to the heat are being seen among young people.

items.title: Polestar has been muscled out of the US market
items.summary: Polestar won't be allowed to sell its electric vehicles model year 2027 and beyond in the US after the federal government denied the company's request for authorization under a new rule banning vehicles with software from China. In a press release, the company says the decision to retreat from the US follows a recent decision […]

items.title: This 65W 10K Qi2.2 MagSafe power bank with lanyard cable charges your entire Apple kit on the go, and it’s $48 today (40% off)
items.summary: As part of the ongoing Prime Day sale, LISEN’s official B King storefront is now offering the brand’s new 10,000mAh 65W Qi2.2 MagSafe power bank for $47.99 shipped. Don’t forget to enter promo code XX2HL3TA during checkout to see the discounted price during checkout. This model only recently launched at $100, but it’s been going for $80 since it saw its first deal shortly after its debut. Today’s Prime Day takes $33 off that mark to deliver a new best price to beat with 41% discount. It’s one of the more feature-packed battery packs out there, complete with support for Qi2.2 25W wireless charging, and more, and you can learn more about it below.

items.title: Sonos Prime Day deals deliver Amazon all-time low on new Era 100 SL, more

items.title: a16z-backed Base Power is offering cheaper electricity to the power grid that needs it most
items.summary: Base Power is skipping the PJM's troubled interconnection queue by placing its batteries at people's homes, offering backup services in exchange.

items.title: Here’s a bunch of Prime Day deals on keyboards, mice, and other peripherals we like
items.summary: RAMageddon has come for computers. The price of memory chips, hard drives, and solid state storage has skyrocketed. That’s led to price increases on desktop and laptop RAM, SSDs, spinning hard drives, and pretty much everything that uses any of those things. Consoles are more expensive. Desktops are more expensive. Laptops are more expensive. Tablets […]

items.title: Score up to 44% Prime Day savings on a massive lineup of LEGO sets – Star Wars, Technic, Botanicals, City, more all from $8
items.summary: As part of the ongoing Amazon Prime Day Sale, you can find LEGO sets getting up to 44% discounts right now across a wide variety of themes. There’s something for everybody during this event, like the Star Wars Imperial Star Destroyer at a new low price of $111.99 shipped, down from $160, which is a great way to round out collections/displays far, far away. Of course, you can find plenty more options, like the Technic Peugeot 9X8 24H Le Mans Hybrid Hypercar for $139.99 shipped, landing just $3 above its all-time low. These and much more are waiting for you below (with the bestselling sets on sale available here), so dive on in and happy building!

This recently-released office chair dials up the look most of us are used to seeing. It swaps out the usual casual look for a more sophisicated vibe, and I’m a fan. When I get an office chair next time, I’ll be on the lookout for a style like this.

items.title: I’ve been logging my weight in Apple Health for years, get started today with this $19 scale
items.summary:
RENPHO Apple Health-ready Smart Scale

Buy for $19 (Reg. $25)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

When Apple Health-compatible smart scales first hit the scene, I quickly hopped on the bandwagon. Fast forward to today and I now have years and years of data I can use to keep tabs on changes in my weight, BMI, and more. If you don’t have one, I recommend picking one up sooner rather than later.

items.summary:

Buy for $10.50 (Reg. $17)

Prime-exclusive discount.

What we love

A lot of wall charger protrude from the wall quite a bit and then you still have to plug in a cable that juts out even further. This offering takes a different approach with a flat design that sends USB-A and Type-C ports downward. The Type-C port can reach up to 65W, making it suitable for smartphones, tablets, laptops, and more.
